title: Activate Your King
summary: In the endgame, your king fights

steps.title: King Power
steps.text: In the middlegame the king hides. In the endgame he comes out to fight. Here your king must escort his pawn to promotion. Technique matters.

steps.prompt: Push your king forward — take the opposition.
steps.hint: Kd6 or Kf6 — both seize the opposition.
